title: oldenlandia bracteosa
intro: Oldenlandia bracteosa, also known as "Mabolo" or "Gamboge", is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the tropical regions of the Philippines and Indonesia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Oldenlandia bracteosa include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and acting as an antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of Oldenlandia bracteosa are often made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by mixing the plant's extracts with other herbs to create remedies for various ailments.
